## Checklist

- [ ] Diff is under 200 lines per file (chunked mode)
- [ ] No secrets in code, logs, or comments
- [ ] RLS policies remain intact (no policy drops without migration)
- [ ] Preflight checks pass (lint, typecheck, test, build)
- [ ] Change is traceable: job -> diff -> log -> test result
